title: Golden Syrup Biscuits
description: These savory biscuits are a kid-friendly Saudi Arabian treat featuring golden syrup and a touch of flakiness. Perfect for any mealtime as a low-sodium friendly option.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine flour and softened butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Add golden syrup and salt. Mix gently until just combined; overmixing can cause the biscuits to become tough.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Place balls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, ensuring they are spaced apart for even baking.
Bake in preheated oven for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
Enjoy these biscuits as an appetizer or snack.
